title: Leadership
questions: What springs to mind when you hear the word 'leadership'?
Do people automatically have leadership or must they learn it?
What do you think of the leadership of your country?
What is the most important thing a leader must remember about leadership?
Have you ever been in positions of leadership?
What leadership quality do you most value/admire?
Who in the world do you think possesses the greatest leadership skills?
Would you like to take a course in leadership?
What do you think of the leadership of the US President and your country's leader?
What leadership qualities do you want or need in the future?
Are people who have leadership qualities more physically attractive than people with no leadership skills?
Is there always stress with leadership?
Does leadership exist in a romantic partnership?
Is leadership an art or a science?
Do you think people with no leadership skills have a more or les happy life?
What different kinds of leadership styles are there?
How often are there leadership battles in your country? Do they interest you?
